title: Corning: Glass Technologies Behind AI And Consumer Devices Will Drive Q3 2023
text: Corning's Q2 2023 report showed diversified revenue streams and recent news suggests new opportunities for continued growth in Q3 2023. Optical communications and display technologies expected to drive changes in Q3 2023. Federal BEAD program for broadband access and data-intensive AI datacenter segment offer steady revenue and growth opportunities for Corning.

title: 10 U.S. Companies Face Much Larger Problems In China Than Apple
text: If you think Apple has a big "China problem" — you'll be shocked to know it's tiny compared with some other S&P 500 companies.

title: Corning Incorporated (GLW) Citi's 2023 Global Technology Conference (Transcript)
text: Corning Incorporated (NYSE:GLW ) Citi's 2023 Global Technology Conference Call September 7, 2023 8:15 AM ET Company Participants Jeffrey Evenson - Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer Conference Call Participants Asiya Merchant - Citigroup Inc. Asiya Merchant Asiya Merchant here, I work with the Citi Research team, looking at hardware and the components name. Really glad to have Corning here.
